title: 10Pcs Holly Berry Picks with Leaves, Red and Green Artificial Christmas Berries for Wreaths, Tree Ornaments, Vase Fillers, DIY Crafts, Home Holiday Decor
features: PACKAGE CONTENTS: Set of 10 artificial holly berry picks with vibrant red berries and realistic green leaves for festive holiday decorating
VERSATILE DECOR: Perfect for enhancing Christmas wreaths, tree ornaments, vase arrangements, and various holiday craft projects
DESIGN FEATURES: Each pick features clusters of bright red berries complemented by traditional holly-style green foliage
HOLIDAY CRAFTING: Ideal materials for DIY Christmas decorations, allowing creative freedom in festive home styling
DECORATIVE APPLICATIONS: Suitable for indoor display, wreath making, floral arrangements, and seasonal home accents
description: Transform your holiday décor with these charming artificial holly berry picks. Each set includes 10 meticulously crafted stems featuring vibrant red berries complemented by realistic green leaves, perfect for creating festive arrangements. These versatile decorative elements add a classic Christmas touch to wreaths, tree ornaments, and seasonal displays. Ideal for both crafting enthusiasts and holiday decorators, these berry picks can be incorporated into DIY projects, used as vase fillers, or arranged throughout your home to create a warm, festive atmosphere. The durable construction ensures these decorative picks maintain their beauty throughout the holiday season, while their realistic appearance brings the traditional charm of holly berries to your seasonal décor without the maintenance of live plants. Whether you're crafting a custom wreath, enhancing your Christmas tree, or creating table centrepieces, these holly berry picks provide the perfect finishing touch to your holiday decorating projects.
